ref_classifications.reason: The reference explicitly points to Part B, Sec. 3.18.6, which is outside this Part A PDF/catalog supply.
ref_classifications.evidence: Raw PDF physical page 124 says "Matrix cocondensation reactions of this type have been studied most extensively as shown in Part B, Sec. 3.18.6" and then "These spectra are shown in Fig. 3.67 (of Sec. 3.18.6)." The contents pages for this PDF list only Chapters 1-2 plus appendices.

ref_classifications.reason: The reference explicitly points to Part B, Sec. 3.21.4, which is outside this Part A PDF/catalog supply.
ref_classifications.evidence: Raw PDF physical page 125 says "The IR spectra shown in Fig. 3.76 (in Sec. 3.21.4)" while this PDF's contents stop at Chapter 2. The same paragraph also cites "Fig. 1.82 (Sec. 1.22.4 of Part B)", confirming these are cross-part references.

overrides.reason: Raw PDF physical page 130 prints the table heading "TABLE 1.19. The 230 Space Groups". MinerU mis-OCRed the local caption block into "<sub>E</sub> <sub>1.19.</sub> <sub>The</sub> <sub>230</sub> <sub>Space</sub> G" and left its id at tbl-1.6, so the in-text Table 1.19 reference at body[1040] had no supply.
